Explanation: The table is organized into three year groups that repeat on a 3-year cycle:
- Year 1 includes 2013, 2016, 2019, 2022, etc.
- Year 2 includes 2014, 2017, 2020, 2023, etc.
- Year 3 includes 2015, 2018, 2021, 2024, etc.
Each group corresponds to specific verse ranges for the readings. Because the same group recurs every three years, the same verses are read again after 3 years.
